articles.author: Jane Lytvynenko
articles.title: Fakes, slop, distortions and spin: How the media environment made this Trump assassination attempt unbelievable - NBC News
articles.description: In the minutes, hours and days following Saturday’s interrupted White House Correspondents’ Association dinner, Americans were inundated by falsehoods and conspiracy theories from nearly every flank.
